headline: Evercore ISI Hikes Union Pacific (UNP) Price Target as Rail Volumes Accelerate
summary: Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP) is included among Billionaire Steven Cohen’s Top 11 Dividend Stock Picks. On June 25, Evercore ISI raised its price recommendation on Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP) to $294 from $277. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the stock. In a preview of the rail sector, analyst Jonathan Chappell said Class I railroads […]
